CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS Studios (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(100), country VARCHAR(40), city VARCHAR(60), founded_year INT, num_employees INT, is_independent BOOLEAN, parent_company VARCHAR(80))

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS VideoGames (id INT PRIMARY KEY, title VARCHAR(120), id_studio INT, release_year INT, genre VARCHAR(40), subgenre VARCHAR(40), metacritic_score INT, user_score DECIMAL(3,1), copies_sold_million DECIMAL(6,2), multiplayer BOOLEAN, game_engine VARCHAR(60), FOREIGN KEY (id_studio) REFERENCES Studios(id))
